readiness.label: The Readiness Layer
readiness.title: Control the Readiness Layer
readiness.body: Before training, certification, or execution, candidates and teams pass through a universal readiness layer. This layer surfaces decision quality, AI misuse, communication risk, and role fit — before they are submitted, hired, or scaled.
readiness.conclusion: Partners license this system to control who is ready for downstream execution.

intelligence.title: Readiness & Placement Intelligence
intelligence.description: Everyone enters through the same readiness layer. It is evaluative, not instructional.
items: Can this person operate safely in an AI-mediated environment?
Where does risk appear under pressure?
What, if anything, should happen next?
intelligence.clarification: This layer determines whether downstream capability work is required — or whether nothing else is needed.

hero.label: Partnerships
hero.title: License Judgment and Gating
hero.subtitle: Control who is ready before execution begins.

items.title: License
items.description: License the readiness layer for your placement and hiring processes.

items.title: Embed
items.description: Embed readiness diagnostics into leadership development programs.

items.title: Internal
items.description: Run internal readiness assessments before capability work begins.

items.title: Certify
items.description: Certify your facilitators to administer the readiness layer.

proof.label: Proof
proof.title: Partnerships that work.
proof.description: AI Leadership Program with April Sabral started as a single session and expanded into a recurring program. That's what happens when the system works.

cta.label: Connect
cta.title: Ready to Partner?
cta.description: We're keeping this lightweight. DM on LinkedIn to start the conversation.
